title: veronica hederifolia subsp. lucorum
intro: Veronica hederifolia subsp. lucorum, also known as the Wood Speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Veronica hederifolia subsp. lucorum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
